summary: PR #14 approved after re-review cycle. Initial review BLOCKED with 4 coding-standards violations. All 4 violations resolved: AppTextButton used throughout, 12 widget classes extracted to 11 separate files, Semantics labels use ARB keys via context.l10n, go_router named routes replace MaterialPageRoute. Architecture is clean (no layer violations, ResultState<T> correct, cursor pagination enforced, FCM @pragma handler correct, NotificationsCubit @lazySingleton in root MultiBlocProvider correct). dart analyze: No issues found. flutter test: 64 pass / 1 pre-existing fail (TC-2-28, unchanged from iter-1). Decision: APPROVED.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.detail: tech_lead.md, state.json, iteration_checkpoint.md, tech_lead.json, tech_lead-skill.md all written

qualityGates.name: architecture_clean
qualityGates.detail: Domain layer: zero Flutter imports. Data layer: zero BuildContext. Presentation: no direct HTTP calls, no DTO exposure. Dependencies flow correctly. ResultState<T> pattern used throughout. FCM @pragma('vm:entry-point') present. Cursor pagination enforced.

qualityGates.name: lint_passes
qualityGates.detail: dart analyze: No issues found! (0 errors, 0 warnings). Exit code 0.

qualityGates.name: tests_pass
qualityGates.detail: flutter test: 64 pass / 1 pre-existing fail (TC-2-28 rider email — unchanged from iter-1). 21 new test cases added (TC-2-20 through TC-2-40). 0 new failures.

qualityGates.name: security_checks
qualityGates.detail: No secrets in source. Firebase ID token auth via interceptor on all API calls. FCM token only partially logged (first 10 chars) in kDebugMode using dart:developer log. google-services.json not tracked. No print() calls in lib/.

qualityGates.name: review_completed
qualityGates.detail: PR #14 reviewed in full. Decision: BLOCKED — 4 violations found (TextButton, one-widget-per-file, hardcoded Semantics strings, MaterialPageRoute). Fix cycle in progress.

reReview.dartAnalyze: PASS — No issues found! (0 errors, 0 warnings)

violationsResolved.detail: AppTextButton used in notifications_view.dart (markAllRead action) and soat_status_view.dart (edit action). No raw TextButton remaining.

11 files created: soat_data_view.dart, soat_detail_row.dart, soat_empty_state.dart, soat_manual_form_view.dart, soat_section_header.dart, soat_source_grid.dart, soat_source_option.dart, soat_status_view.dart (soat/widgets/), and notifications_data_view.dart, notifications_empty_state.dart, notifications_error_state.dart (notifications/widgets/). Each file contains exactly one widget class.

ARB keys added: notification_bell_unread_label (with {count} placeholder), notification_bell_label, notification_item_accessibility_label (with {title} and {time} placeholders). All Semantics labels use context.l10n.<key>.

AppRoutes.soatUpload, AppRoutes.soatStatus, AppRoutes.soatManualForm added to app_routes.dart. Three GoRoute entries registered in app_router.dart. All soat navigation uses context.pushNamed(). No MaterialPageRoute remaining.

blockingIssues.description: One-widget-per-file violation — multiple widget classes in same file
blockingIssues.fix: Extract each widget class to its own file

blockingIssues.description: Hardcoded Spanish strings in Semantics labels
blockingIssues.fix: Add ARB keys for accessibility labels and use context.l10n.<key>
Add AppRoutes.soatManualForm named route and navigate via context.pushNamed()
